data.content: Implementation complete. Fixed queued-phase filtering in both beads-backend.ts and knots-backend.ts to include ancestor chains for queued children whose parents are not in a queued state. The fix composes includeDescendantsOfQueueParents (existing downward expansion) with includeActiveAncestors (upward expansion) so the queue screen shows both directions. Added 5 regression tests across beads-backend-coverage, knots-backend, and knots-guardrails test files. All 2217 tests pass, lint/typecheck/build clean.
